violations.text: The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by accumulation of droppings in the office area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2023
Taco filling and tomatoes were observed with a mold like substance in the cold drawers. PIC voluntarily disposed of food items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2023

Eggs and other food items were observed held at 45-47 degrees Fahrenheit in the flip top prep unit with cold drawers. Ambient temperature of the unit was 46 degrees Fahrenheit. All food items were placed in the unit under 2 hours prior of inspection and moved to refrigeration to rapidly cool. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2023

The flip top prep unit with cold drawers was observed maintaining an ambient temperature of 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit taken out of service until it can be serviced/repaired/replaced. Equipment must be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023

The ice machine was observed with an air-break. The ice machine is lacking an air-gap. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023
